line_items.description: ErgoFlex 8400 Task Chair — Black fabric, 4D arms, synchro-tilt, adjustable lumbar, 300 lb rating
ErgoFlex 8400 Task Chair — Graphite fabric, 4D arms, synchro-tilt, adjustable lumbar, 300 lb rating
SwayLine 6100 Conference Chair — White shell, sled base, armless, stackable (low profile)
StackPro 2200 Stacking Chair — Blue polypropylene seat, chrome frame, ganging clips included
UrbanGuest 3300 Guest Chair — Charcoal fabric, fixed arms, steel frame, non-marking feet
StackPro Dolly — capacity 12 chairs per stack, locking casters (for CHR-STK-2200 series)
Soft-Floor Glide Kit (set of 5) — for ErgoFlex 8400 series (reduces floor wear on vinyl/laminate)
On-site assembly service — non-stacking chairs only (task + conference + guest categories)
White-glove delivery + appointment scheduling (Ontario) (Site A + Site B)
Fuel surcharge (rate per contract; applied to shipment)
Environmental handling fee (recycling + pallet recovery) billed per chair unit shipped

site_allocations: Site A — Toronto (TOR-OPS-221): multiple chair categories and 1 white-glove delivery stop; Site B — Ottawa (OTT-TRN-114): multiple chair categories, stacking chairs and 1 white-glove delivery stop; Site C — Montréal (MTL-ADM-038): multiple chair categories, Québec delivery (rendez-vous)
other_info: Invoice number, invoice date, due date, and total taken from PDF header image (page 1). PO and payment terms from email confirmed by PDF image. Currency CAD. Taxes split by jurisdiction in PDF. No conflicts detected.
